title: General Mills: Underlying Volume Challenges
text: General Mills has managed inflation reasonably well, but the issue is that strong pricing hides huge underlying volume declines. While earnings hold up well and are expected to increase this year, I fear the continued higher pricing of its products versus competition. Despite a recent pullback, I am waiting for a slightly more attractive entry point as I am not impressed with the underlying business performance.

title: Building The Dividend Growth Portfolio In 2023
text: My U.S. dividend growth portfolio, constructed in 2015, has outperformed the market by over 2% annually. The portfolio was designed to be resilient in a major stock market correction, focusing on dividend achievers with at least 10 years of dividend growth. For building a similar portfolio in 2023, I considered valuation and growth, leaning towards larger cap or mega-cap stocks, and factored in retirement income needs.

title: General Mills Backed Supply Change Capital Debuts With $40 Million To Invest In The Future Of Food
text: Latina-led venture capital firm, Supply Change Capital, has officially closed its $40 million inaugural fund from limited partners, including General Mills' 301 INC.

title: EXTRA, EXTRA! READ ALL ABOUT IT: General Mills Doubles Vitamin D in Big G Cereals
text: MINNEAPOLIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--General Mills interrupts your morning social scrolling to bring BIG news to the breakfast table: family-favorite cereals like Cinnamon Toast Crunch and Cheerios now deliver 20% of the Daily Value of Vitamin D – twice the previous amount – with the majority of Big G Cereals to follow in the coming weeks. As the category leader, General Mills is the first to broadly roll out this important nutrition upgrade across most of its Big G Cereals and is championing the effo.

text: It was hard to find big stock market winners in 2022. But dividend stocks were among the better performers.

title: General Mills: The Good News Wall Street Missed
text: General Mills is one of the largest food companies on Earth. It has been doing fairly well at offsetting inflation so far.

title: General Mills (GIS) Gains From Business Strength Amid Risks
text: General Mills (GIS) benefits from strength in its North America Foodservice segment, effective pricing actions and acquisitions. However, rising costs and expenses are concerning.

title: General Mills is paying this agriculture tech startup to help make Cheerios greener
text: Regrow Ag is a tech and science startup that sells high level agriculture data to improve regenerative farming and reduce agriculture's carbon emissions.

title: The Retirees' Dividend Portfolio: John And Jane's June 2023 Taxable Account Update
text: The Taxable Account generated $2,111.31 of dividend income for June 2023 compared with $1,825.40 of dividend income for June 2022. The Taxable Account had a balance of $533.9K as of June 30, 2023, vs. $493.5K on June 30, 2022. The annualized cost basis yield is 5.44%. Five companies in the Taxable portfolio paid increased dividends or paid a special dividend during the month of June.

title: Dividend Income Summary: Lanny's June 2023 Summary
text: Investing as often, and early, as you can allows compound interest (aka dividends) to work it's magic. The retirement accounts brought in a total dividend income amount of $1,948.91 or 36% of the dividend income total. There were 9 dividend increases, including the exchange traded funds (ETFs) in the mix, such as VYM, VOO and VIG.

title: 5 Stocks in Focus on Their Recent Dividend Hike
text: At this stage, dividend-paying stocks should be in demand as investors try to safeguard their portfolios. Five such stocks are: GIS, WOR, GBX, PNC, GLOP.
